tif

Class GpsDataManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • tif.GpsDataManager

  • public final class GpsDataManager
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
      private GpsDataManager()
      Default constructor will always throw an exception.

    • Constructor Detail

      • GpsDataManager

        private GpsDataManager()
        Default constructor will always throw an exception.
        Throws:
        java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException - to indicate that instantiation is not supported

    • Method Detail

      • getDisplayValue

        public static java.lang.String getDisplayValue(DirectoryIFD gpsDir,
                                               TagIFD_GPS tag)

      • formatCoordinate

        public static java.lang.String formatCoordinate(DirectoryIFD gpsDir,
                                                TagIFD_GPS tag)
        Formats GPS-specific rational arrays into human-readable DMS strings.
        Parameters:
        rationals - the coordinate components (degrees, minutes, seconds)
        tag - the specific GPS tag (Latitude or Longitude)
        parentDir - the directory context for reference lookups (e.g., 'N', 'S', 'E', 'W')
        Returns:
        a formatted coordinate string

      • decodeGpsArray

        private static java.lang.String decodeGpsArray(RationalNumber[] rationals,
                                               Taggable tag,
                                               DirectoryIFD dir)

      • lookupDirectionRefTag

        private static Taggable lookupDirectionRefTag(Taggable tag)

      • lookupRefTag

        private static Taggable lookupRefTag(Taggable tag)
